Home/Services/WiFi and Wireless Networks

WiFi and Wireless Networks

WiFi networks for offices, retail, common areas, events, multi-unit properties, condos, construction sites, and industrial sites.

Opticable sells, manages, maintains, installs, and cables WiFi networks for more than standard commercial office environments. The scope can cover common areas, events, retail, multi-unit buildings, condo properties, offices, factories, construction sites, and other sites that need dependable wireless coverage and the infrastructure behind it.

Request a quoteView all services

Services

Sales, management, maintenance, installation, and cabling for WiFi networks across buildings, shared areas, events, construction sites, and active sites.

Service overview

WiFi and Wireless Networks

Scope, benefits, and common use cases.

Included work

What the scope can include

  • WiFi sales, installation, and access point cabling for offices, retail, common areas, multi-unit properties, condo buildings, factories, construction sites, and event spaces
  • Coverage planning, access point placement, and wireless design tied to layout, density, and active user demands
  • Switching, patching, rack support, and network coordination for wireless infrastructure
  • Ongoing management and maintenance for wireless networks that need dependable day-to-day performance

Benefits

Benefits

  • More dependable wireless coverage across different site types and shared-use environments
  • Cleaner coordination between wireless equipment, structured cabling, and the network core
  • Easier long-term support, changes, and expansion as coverage needs evolve

Typical use cases

Typical use cases

Sales, management, maintenance, installation, and cabling for WiFi networks across buildings, shared areas, events, construction sites, and active sites.

  • Office WiFi rollouts and expansions
  • Retail and hospitality guest or staff WiFi improvements
  • Common-area WiFi for managed properties and condo buildings
  • Event WiFi and temporary wireless deployments
  • Construction site WiFi and temporary project connectivity
  • Factory, warehouse, and industrial wireless coverage projects

Industries served

Industries served

  • Offices and commercial properties
  • Retail and hospitality
  • Common areas and shared-use spaces
  • Multi-unit, condo, and mixed-use properties
  • Construction sites and temporary project spaces
  • Industrial and warehouse sites
  • Events and temporary wireless deployments

Services

Related services

Related services often delivered in the same project.

Structured Cabling

Copper, Ethernet, coaxial, labeling, patching, and clean cable organization for commercial spaces.

View service page

Network Infrastructure

Server racks, network rooms, handoff routing, patching, switching support, and infrastructure cleanup.

View service page

IP Phone Systems

Business phone infrastructure, handset connectivity, VoIP-ready cabling, and network support for office communication.

View service page

Security Camera Systems

Sales, management, and installation of camera systems with PoE, recording, remote viewing, and network coordination.

View service page

Access Control Systems

Door reader wiring, panel support, network connectivity, and secure entry infrastructure.

View service page

Intercom Systems

Building entry, gate, and tenant communication systems coordinated with access and network infrastructure.

View service page

Fiber Optic Installation

Fiber backbones, risers, handoff extensions, and high-capacity links for commercial properties.

View service page

Project Intake

Need a technology specialist for cameras, secure entry, WiFi, or building communications?

Send a quote request with the property type, required systems, and target timeline.

Request a quoteView all services

Opticable serves businesses and managed properties across Quebec, including Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, the South Shore, the North Shore, and the Laurentians.
